raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered some clothing from " XXXX XXXX, '' a XXXX company, on XX/XX/year>. 

Over the course of the next several months I emailed back and forth with the company, they kept saying they were about to ship the clothes. They never did. I disputed the {$320.00} charge on my Citi credit card on XX/XX/year>. 

After I opened the dispute, XXXX XXXX told me by email that the clothes were ready to ship and that they would ship them if I withdrew the dispute. I did so on XX/XX/year>. Again, nothing was ever shipped and they stopped responding to emails, so I called Citi again to reopen the dispute. They told me this would be no problem and that I would receive a response within 7 business days. I received a letter on XX/XX/year> saying that the dispute was resolved in favor of the merchant. 

I would like a refund of this money since I never received the goods I paid for in any way, shape, or form.
